positive: A vibrant, minimalist illustration of a mystical woodland animal silhouette (like a fox, owl, or deer) integrated with geometric floral patterns and celestial elements (stars, crescent moon). The scene should be highly stylized, rendered in a continuous line art style mixed with solid, block color fills. Use a color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, muted teal, and cream. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes against a neutral, creamy background. Central composition, perfect for apparel print, conveying wonder and natural magic. Vector art quality, high contrast, symmetry, highly detailed, aesthetically pleasing.
negative: blur, noise, artifact, text, watermark, signature, lowres, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, messy, graffiti, messy lines, photo-realistic, logo, trademark
